title: Cloud Security Responsibility Matrix
description: A visual representation of the Shared Responsibility Model in cloud computing, showing the division of security responsibilities between the Cloud Service Provider (CSP) and the Cloud Customer across different service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS).
relationships: The CSP is responsible for security 'of' the cloud (infrastructure)
The Customer is responsible for security 'in' the cloud (data, access, application)
Responsibility shifts towards the CSP as you move from IaaS to SaaS
